references.key: we parse the unified diff with unidiff
references.raw: Extract modified lines from the PR diff. We parse the unified diff with unidiff. For each hunk, we record the post-edit line set: added lines directly, and (for chunks of removed lines) the surrounding post-edit lines br
references.title: We parse the unified diff with unidiff

references.key: we execute the repository s test suite under coverage py and record for each test the file line pairs that were executed
references.raw: Collect per-test coverage. We execute the repository’s test suite under coverage.py and record, for each test, the (file, line) pairs that were executed.
references.title: We execute the repository’s test suite under coverage.py and record, for each test, the (file, line) pairs that were executed

references.key: coverage py marks functionand class definition header lines as well as import statements as covered at import time even when their bodies n
references.raw: Strip false positives from coverage. coverage.py marks functionand class-definition header lines as well as import statements as covered at import time, even when their bodies never run in a given test. We use ast and as
references.title: coverage.py marks functionand class-definition header lines as well as import statements as covered at import time, even when their bodies n

references.key: for each test we intersect its filtered executed line set and its symbol expansion intervals with the pr s modified line set
references.raw: Intersect. For each test, we intersect its filtered executed-line set (and its symbol-expansion intervals) with the PR’s modified-line set. If the intersection is non-empty, we mark the test as a guarding test for that P
references.title: For each test, we intersect its filtered executed-line set (and its symbol-expansion intervals) with the PR’s modified-line set
